GameID.description: The unique ID of the game tied to the StartingGoaltenders

Season.description: The end year of season (2021-22 would be 2022)

SeasonType.description: The type of season that this record corresponds to (1=Regular Season; 2=Preseason; 3=Postseason; 5=AllStar; 6=Exhibition).

DateTime.description: The date and time of the game in US Eastern Time

Status.description: Indicates the game's status. Possible values include: Scheduled; InProgress; Final; F/SO; F/OT; Suspended; Postponed; Delayed; Canceled; Forfeit

HomeTeamID.description: The unique ID of the home team tied to these StartingGoaltenders

HomeTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the home team

AwayTeamID.description: The unique ID of the away team as it relates to the starting goaltenders

AwayTeam.description: The abbreviation [Key] of the away team

HomeGoaltender.description: The information of the home goaltender (PlayerID, TeamID, Team, First & Last Name, Jersey Number, Confirmed)

AwayGoaltender.description: The information of the away goaltender (PlayerID, TeamID, Team, First & Last Name, Jersey Number, Confirmed)
